result.stdout:
Usage: [command] [-h|--help] [--version]

Commands:
  auth-status              Show current authentication status.
  azdo artifacts           List artifacts produced by a build.
  azdo auth-status         Show the currently resolved Azure DevOps authentication path without making an AzDO API request.
  azdo build               Get details of a specific Azure DevOps build.
  azdo builds              List recent builds for an Azure DevOps project.
  azdo changes             Get the commits/changes associated with a build.
  azdo log                 Get log content for a specific build log.
  azdo search-log          Search one build log or all ranked build logs for a pattern.
  azdo search-timeline     Search build timeline for records matching a pattern.
  azdo test-attachments    List attachments for a specific test result.
  azdo test-results        Get test results for a specific test run.
  azdo test-runs           List test runs for a build.
  azdo timeline            Get the build timeline showing stages, jobs, and tasks.
  batch-status             Get status for multiple Helix jobs at once.
  cache clear              Clear all cached data across ALL auth contexts.
  cache status             Show cache size, entry count, oldest/newest entries for the current auth context.
  describe
  download                 Download work item files or a direct URL.
  files                    List uploaded files for a work item.
  find-files               Scan work items in a job to find files matching a pattern.
  llms-txt                 Print comprehensive tool documentation for LLM agents.
  login                    Authenticate with helix.dot.net by storing an API token.
  logout                   Remove stored Helix authentication token.
  logs                     Download console log for a work item to a temp file.
  mcp                      Start the MCP server over stdio for use with MCP clients (VS Code, Claude Desktop, etc.).
  parse-uploaded-trx       Parse TRX/xUnit XML test result files uploaded to Helix blob storage.
  search-log               Search a work item's console log or uploaded file for a pattern.
  status                   Show work item summary for a Helix job.
  work-item                Show detailed info about a specific work item.

commands.payload:
Usage: [command] [-h|--help] [--version]

Commands:
  auth-status              Show current authentication status.
  azdo artifacts           List artifacts produced by a build.
  azdo auth-status         Show the currently resolved Azure DevOps authentication path without making an AzDO API request.
  azdo build               Get details of a specific Azure DevOps build.
  azdo builds              List recent builds for an Azure DevOps project.
  azdo changes             Get the commits/changes associated with a build.
  azdo log                 Get log content for a specific build log.
  azdo search-log          Search one build log or all ranked build logs for a pattern.
  azdo search-timeline     Search build timeline for records matching a pattern.
  azdo test-attachments    List attachments for a specific test result.
  azdo test-results        Get test results for a specific test run.
  azdo test-runs           List test runs for a build.
  azdo timeline            Get the build timeline showing stages, jobs, and tasks.
  batch-status             Get status for multiple Helix jobs at once.
  cache clear              Clear all cached data across ALL auth contexts.
  cache status             Show cache size, entry count, oldest/newest entries for the current auth context.
  describe
  download                 Download work item files or a direct URL.
  files                    List uploaded files for a work item.
  find-files               Scan work items in a job to find files matching a pattern.
  llms-txt                 Print comprehensive tool documentation for LLM agents.
  login                    Authenticate with helix.dot.net by storing an API token.
  logout                   Remove stored Helix authentication token.
  logs                     Download console log for a work item to a temp file.
  mcp                      Start the MCP server over stdio for use with MCP clients (VS Code, Claude Desktop, etc.).
  parse-uploaded-trx       Parse TRX/xUnit XML test result files uploaded to Helix blob storage.
  search-log               Search a work item's console log or uploaded file for a pattern.
  status                   Show work item summary for a Helix job.
  work-item                Show detailed info about a specific work item.

result.stdout:
Usage: azdo artifacts [arguments...] [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

List artifacts produced by a build.

Arguments:
  [0] <string>    AzDO build ID (integer) or full AzDO build URL.

Options:
  --pattern <string>    Filter artifacts by name using glob-style matching. [Default: @"*"]
  --top <int>           Maximum number of artifacts to return (default 100). [Default: 100]
  --json                Output as structured JSON.
  --schema

  --schema

result.stdout:
Usage: azdo builds [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

List recent builds for an Azure DevOps project.

Options:
  --org <string>            Azure DevOps organization (default: dnceng-public). [Default: @"dnceng-public"]
  --project <string>        Azure DevOps project (default: public). [Default: @"public"]
  --top <int>               Maximum number of builds to return (default 20). [Default: 20]
  --branch <string?>        Filter by branch name. [Default: null]
  --pr-number <string?>     Filter by pull request number. [Default: null]
  --definition-id <int?>    Filter by pipeline definition ID. [Default: null]
  --status <string?>        Filter by build status. [Default: null]
  --json                    Output as structured JSON.
  --schema

  --branch <string?>        Filter by branch name. [Default: null]
  --pr-number <string?>     Filter by pull request number. [Default: null]
  --definition-id <int?>    Filter by pipeline definition ID. [Default: null]
  --status <string?>        Filter by build status. [Default: null]
  --json                    Output as structured JSON.
  --schema

Usage: azdo log [arguments...] [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Get log content for a specific build log.

result.stdout:
Usage: azdo search-log [arguments...] [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Search one build log or all ranked build logs for a pattern.

Arguments:
  [0] <string>    AzDO build ID (integer) or full AzDO build URL.

Options:
  --pattern <string>       Text pattern to search for (case-insensitive). [Default: @"error"]
  --context-lines <int>    Lines of context before and after each match. [Default: 2]
  --max-matches <int>      Maximum number of matches to return (default 100). [Default: 100]
  --log-id <int?>          Log ID from the timeline record's log reference. Omit to search all ranked logs. [Default: null]
  --max-logs <int>         Maximum number of log steps to download and search (default 50). [Default: 50]
  --min-lines <int>        Minimum line count to include a log in the search. [Default: 5]
  --json                   Output as structured JSON.
  --schema

commands.payload:
Usage: azdo search-log [arguments...] [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Search one build log or all ranked build logs for a pattern.

Arguments:
  [0] <string>    AzDO build ID (integer) or full AzDO build URL.

Options:
  --pattern <string>       Text pattern to search for (case-insensitive). [Default: @"error"]
  --context-lines <int>    Lines of context before and after each match. [Default: 2]
  --max-matches <int>      Maximum number of matches to return (default 100). [Default: 100]
  --log-id <int?>          Log ID from the timeline record's log reference. Omit to search all ranked logs. [Default: null]
  --max-logs <int>         Maximum number of log steps to download and search (default 50). [Default: 50]
  --min-lines <int>        Minimum line count to include a log in the search. [Default: 5]
  --json                   Output as structured JSON.
  --schema

result.stdout:
Usage: azdo search-timeline [arguments...] [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Search build timeline for records matching a pattern.

Arguments:
  [0] <string>    AzDO build ID (integer) or full AzDO build URL.
  [1] <string>    Text pattern to search for in record names and issue messages (case-insensitive).

Options:
  --type <string?>     Filter by record type: Stage, Job, or Task. [Default: null]
  --result <string>    Result filter: 'failed' (default — includes non-succeeded records or records with timeline issues, same as 'azdo timeline') or 'all'. [Default: @"failed"]
  --json               Output as structured JSON.
  --schema

commands.payload:
Usage: azdo search-timeline [arguments...] [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Search build timeline for records matching a pattern.

Arguments:
  [0] <string>    AzDO build ID (integer) or full AzDO build URL.
  [1] <string>    Text pattern to search for in record names and issue messages (case-insensitive).

Options:
  --type <string?>     Filter by record type: Stage, Job, or Task. [Default: null]
  --result <string>    Result filter: 'failed' (default — includes non-succeeded records or records with timeline issues, same as 'azdo timeline') or 'all'. [Default: @"failed"]
  --json               Output as structured JSON.
  --schema

  --project <string>    Azure DevOps project (default: public). [Default: @"public"]
  --top <int>           Maximum number of attachments to return (default 100). [Default: 100]
  --json                Output as structured JSON.
  --schema

Usage: [command] [-h|--help] [--version]

Commands:
  auth-status              Show current authentication status.
  azdo artifacts           List artifacts produced by a build.
  azdo auth-status         Show the currently resolved Azure DevOps authentication path without making an AzDO API request.
  azdo build               Get details of a specific Azure DevOps build.
  azdo builds              List recent builds for an Azure DevOps project.
  azdo changes             Get the commits/changes associated with a build.
  azdo log                 Get log content for a specific build log.
  azdo search-log          Search one build log or all ranked build logs for a pattern.
  azdo search-timeline     Search build timeline for records matching a pattern.
  azdo test-attachments    List attachments for a specific test result.
  azdo test-results        Get test results for a specific test run.
  azdo test-runs           List test runs for a build.
  azdo timeline            Get the build timeline showing stages, jobs, and tasks.
  batch-status             Get status for multiple Helix jobs at once.
  cache clear              Clear all cached data across ALL auth contexts.
  cache status             Show cache size, entry count, oldest/newest entries for the current auth context.
  describe
  download                 Download work item files or a direct URL.
  files                    List uploaded files for a work item.
  find-files               Scan work items in a job to find files matching a pattern.
  llms-txt                 Print comprehensive tool documentation for LLM agents.
  login                    Authenticate with helix.dot.net by storing an API token.
  logout                   Remove stored Helix authentication token.
  logs                     Download console log for a work item to a temp file.
  mcp                      Start the MCP server over stdio for use with MCP clients (VS Code, Claude Desktop, etc.).
  parse-uploaded-trx       Parse TRX/xUnit XML test result files uploaded to Helix blob storage.
  search-log               Search a work item's console log or uploaded file for a pattern.
  status                   Show work item summary for a Helix job.
  work-item                Show detailed info about a specific work item.

result.stdout:
Usage: find-files [arguments...] [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Scan work items in a job to find files matching a pattern.

Arguments:
  [0] <string>    Helix job ID or URL.

Options:
  --pattern <string>    File name or glob pattern (e.g., *.binlog, *.trx, *.dmp). [Default: @"*"]
  --max-items <int>     Max work items to scan (default 50). [Default: 50]

result.stdout:
Usage: parse-uploaded-trx [arguments...] [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Parse TRX/xUnit XML test result files uploaded to Helix blob storage.

Arguments:
  [0] <string>    Helix job ID or URL.
  [1] <string>    Work item name.

Options:
  --file-name <string?>    Specific TRX file name (optional - auto-discovers all .trx files if not set). [Default: null]
  --include-passed         Include passed tests in output (default: false).
  --max-results <int>      Maximum number of test results to return (default: 200). [Default: 200]

commands.payload:
Usage: parse-uploaded-trx [arguments...] [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Parse TRX/xUnit XML test result files uploaded to Helix blob storage.

Arguments:
  [0] <string>    Helix job ID or URL.
  [1] <string>    Work item name.

Options:
  --file-name <string?>    Specific TRX file name (optional - auto-discovers all .trx files if not set). [Default: null]
  --include-passed         Include passed tests in output (default: false).
  --max-results <int>      Maximum number of test results to return (default: 200). [Default: 200]

result.stdout:
Usage: search-log [arguments...] [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Search a work item's console log or uploaded file for a pattern.

Arguments:
  [0] <string>    Helix job ID or URL.
  [1] <string>    Work item name.
  [2] <string>    Text pattern to search for (case-insensitive substring match).

Options:
  --context <int>          Number of context lines before and after each match. [Default: 2]
  --max-matches <int>      Maximum number of matches to return (default 100). [Default: 100]
  --file-name <string?>    File name to search (omit for console log). [Default: null]

commands.payload:
Usage: search-log [arguments...] [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Search a work item's console log or uploaded file for a pattern.

Arguments:
  [0] <string>    Helix job ID or URL.
  [1] <string>    Work item name.
  [2] <string>    Text pattern to search for (case-insensitive substring match).

Options:
  --context <int>          Number of context lines before and after each match. [Default: 2]
  --max-matches <int>      Maximum number of matches to return (default 100). [Default: 100]
  --file-name <string?>    File name to search (omit for console log). [Default: null]

result.stdout:
Usage: status [arguments...] [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Show work item summary for a Helix job.

Arguments:
  [0] <string>    Helix job ID (GUID) or full Helix URL.
  [1] <string>    Filter: 'failed' (default), 'passed', or 'all'.

Options:
  --json      Output as structured JSON instead of human-readable text.
  --schema

commands.payload:
Usage: status [arguments...] [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Show work item summary for a Helix job.

Arguments:
  [0] <string>    Helix job ID (GUID) or full Helix URL.
  [1] <string>    Filter: 'failed' (default), 'passed', or 'all'.

Options:
  --json      Output as structured JSON instead of human-readable text.
  --schema

Show detailed info about a specific work item.

Arguments:
  [0] <string>    Helix job ID (GUID) or full Helix URL.
  [1] <string>    Work item name.

Options:
  --json      Output as structured JSON instead of human-readable text.
  --schema
